task: Compute the inner (dot) product of two 1D vectors
error_location: line 1: np.outer computes outer product, not inner/dot product
clarification_query: Which function computes the scalar dot product of two 1D vectors?
clarification_options: np.inner(v1, v2) — same as dot for 1D
explanation: np.outer(v1, v2) produces a 2D rank-1 matrix. np.dot(v1, v2) or np.inner(v1, v2) gives the scalar dot product.
